Caption:
We LOVE seeing Dana Point all lit up this time of year✨🎄

In case you missed the boat parade of lights last weekend, you still have time to check out all the lights around our beautiful city, it’s truly something special. 

📸: @waterproject 

#visitdanapoint #mydanapoint #danapoint

Welcome to the neighborhood, Kaantique!🎉✂️ — a women’s fashion boutique striving for fair trade and sustainable goods. Both trendy and versatile, come shop all things clothing, jewelry, handbags, and accessories. Oh… and they have dog treats too! 

We’re happy to have you here in Dana Point! Located in La Plaza Park. #shoplocal #visitdanapoint #mydanapoint #danapoint

Step inside @wineexperiencedp 🍷 and discover 25+ wines on tap, curated cheese boards, and elevated bites. The perfect new spot in the heart of the Lantern District to sip, savor, and enjoy the moment. 

#danapoint #visitdanapoint #mydanapoint

Congratulations to the @ritzcarltonlagunaniguel on the grand opening of their beautifully renovated spa! 🧖‍♀️✨ Where luxury, relaxation, and rejuvenation come together. Get ready to unwind in style. 

#visitdanapoint #danapoint #mydanapoint #ritzcarltonspa #ritzcarltonlagunaniguel

We had a BLAST at @saltcreekgrilleoc TRIVIA NIGHT last night🤩

FUN for the WHOLE FAM! Delicious food, great atmosphere, and Family Feud trivia... what could be better?! Join in on the fun every Tuesday night from 6pm-8pm💃🏼
